title: taraxacum proclinatum
intro: Taraxacum proclinatum, commonly known as the upright dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its upright stems and larger flower heads compared to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum proclinatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Taraxacum proclinatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in culinary dishes due to its bitter and slightly sweet flavor.
